warm_signals: proof-first content resonates better than abstract philosophy

experiments.hypothesis: A proof-first warm follow-up to a high-intent buyer converts better than a generic check-in.
experiments.action: Send a specific follow-up to Christopher Laverdure referencing the prior purchase and one concrete outcome path.
experiments.metric: reply rate or referral path opened within 48h

experiments.hypothesis: A counterintuitive proof-first post with a real number beats a polished brand post for engagement and qualified replies.
experiments.action: Publish one short post with a concrete revenue/ops number and one surprising lesson.

experiments.hypothesis: A buyer-scene post leading with a painful workflow moment converts better than an offer-led post.
experiments.action: Draft a before/after post about late follow-up or missed revenue, then attach the CTA after proof.
experiments.metric: clicks to meetrick.ai or booking CTA
